items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the unified scope model for all sources versus selected sources. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data points that confirm the existence or functionality of this model. The linked use case mentions the need for a unified scope model, but without concrete evidence, it is impossible to ascertain whether this requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
